g.text: Multi-Cloud Hybrid Banking with ACM, Portworx, Submariner
Default: replicas=0 (no replicas field in manifest)
NORMAL MODE ON-PREM OUTAGE (Act 2) OSD FAILOVER (Act 3)
Customer → ARO Route → frontend → api-gateway Script: 02-failover-onprem.sh Script: 04-failover-cloud.sh
api-gateway → Submariner → account-service (on-prem) 1. Remove cloud=on-prem label from ManagedCluster 1. Scale up postgres-core on OSD (replicas=1)
api-gateway → Submariner → transaction-service 2. ACM withdraws on-prem ManifestWorks 2. Patch cloud subscription → lifeboat-placement
account-service → postgres-core (on-prem, read/write) 3. Scale up postgres-core on ARO (replicas=1) 3. ACM moves gateway+frontend to OSD
account-service → postgres-archive (PII, on-prem) 4. Gateway detects backend down → limited mode 4. Same limited mode on OSD route
RECOVERY (Act 4): 05-failback-cloud.sh (restore ARO placement) → 03-failback-onprem.sh (re-add label, scale down standby) → gateway auto-detects → normal mode
